mapper.insert: MERGE INTO SEARCH_HISTORIES target USING ( SELECT #{userId} AS USER_ID, #{query} AS SEARCH_QUERY FROM DUAL ) source ON ( target.USER_ID = source.USER_ID AND target.SEARCH_QUERY = source.SEARCH_QUERY AND target.DELETED_AT IS NULL ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET target.CREATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( SEARCH_HISTORY_ID, USER_ID, SEARCH_QUERY ) VALUES ( SEQ_SEARCH_HISTORIES.NEXTVAL, source.USER_ID, source.SEARCH_QUERY )
mapper.select: SELECT SEARCH_HISTORY_ID, USER_ID, SEARCH_QUERY, CREATED_AT, DELETED_AT FROM ( SELECT SEARCH_HISTORY_ID, USER_ID, SEARCH_QUERY, CREATED_AT, DELETED_AT, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY SEARCH_QUERY ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC, SEARCH_HISTORY_ID DESC ) AS rn FROM SEARCH_HISTORIES WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL ) WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC, SEARCH_HISTORY_ID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
